name: @teaspill/reference-deployment
description: Reference deployment (0002:T4.1): the canonical agent-loop + executor-host services for the compose overlay — deterministic onWake conformance agents, env-gated demo agents, real ingress tool clients, and the getting-started example.

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/agent-loop-main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/docker/agent-loop.mjs --external:@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk --banner:js="import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);" && esbuild src/executor-main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/docker/executor.mjs --external:@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk --banner:js="import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);" && rm -rf dist/docker/drizzle && cp -R ../catalog/drizzle dist/docker/drizzle
